utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. In the final property solution, the assistant provided: selected_property (equivalent to property), financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Each of these items is fully detailed with appropriate sub-information (property includes price and details; financing includes terms; legal_services includes costs; moving_services includes costs and details; setup_services includes costs and details; total_budget includes a complete cost breakdown). An extra field 'property_survey' was also added, but that does not affect coverage of required items. Therefore, all 6 required items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a 'Detached House' priced at CAD $850,000 in Oakville with 4 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, and 140 sqm. Among the available purchase properties, the only one with matching features (140 sqm, family-oriented, within the CAD $850K–950K budget, double garage, good school district) is the 'Family House' priced at CAD $650K and rated 10. The financing chosen was a standard mortgage with an arrangement fee of CAD $1200, which matches 'Traditional Mortgage' rated 9. Legal services are 'Premium Legal Package' (rating 9), the property survey is 'Full Structural Survey' (rating 9), moving services are 'Premium Moving' (rating 9), and utility setup corresponds to 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9). These all align well with the ground-truth ratings.
